历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 1392 → 2258 → 1672 → 2508 → 3417, showing a fluctuating and declining trend overall, with a cumulative decline of about 1745 places in the last three years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 3417, a significant decline of 909 places from 2024, reflecting intensifying competition; the provincial science group enrollment plan was 79 in 2021, 86 in 2022, 79 in 2023, 72 in 2024, and 77 in 2025; in 2026, the physics category plan is 95 and the medical category is 13, totaling 108, an increase of about 40% compared to 2025, a significant expansion that theoretically lowers the admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 9th in the Soft Science main list from 2021 to 2024, rising to 8th in 2025-2026, firmly among the top 10 comprehensive universities in China, highly attractive to top-scoring students; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving multiple public opinion incidents such as campus safety and teacher ethics, with 99 negative incidents, which may suppress some students' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity is high (ranked 19th overall), with high short video exposure and sustained attention; it has 20 disciplines rated A- or above, including top disciplines such as Law A+, Marxist Theory A+, Geophysics A+, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A+, and Water Conservancy Engineering A, with strong disciplinary strength, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, highly overlapping with Wuhan University's advantageous disciplines, intensifying competition for popular majors; the number of physics category candidates in the province in 2026 is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 34,032 (+19.7%) from 172,468 in 2025, intensifying competition; Wuhan University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, a core city in the central China region, with some cross-provincial appeal to Shaanxi candidates; the university's enrollment plan in Shaanxi is relatively small, about 108 after expansion, still at a moderate level for an out-of-province university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 3417, a significant enrollment expansion of about 40% in 2026, an increase of about 20% in provincial physics category candidates intensifying competition, a somewhat negative reputation possibly suppressing some enthusiasm, and high Douyin popularity maintaining attention, and taking into account the intensified competition from the surge in candidate numbers and high Douyin popularity, after a slight correction, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4192, with a range of 3692–4692.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 8th in the 2025–2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, consistently in the national Top 10, with a strong liberal arts foundation. Top-tier disciplines such as Law (A+) and Marxist Theory (A+) are highly attractive to liberal arts students. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, with multiple public opinion incidents potentially suppressing some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity is high (overall rank 19), maintaining a high level of attention. Law A+, Marxist Theory A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Journalism and Communication A-, Business Administration A, etc., cover a wide range of advantageous liberal arts disciplines, making them highly attractive to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law continues to be hot and recommended, Chinese Language/Literature majors are warming up, while Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the number of history category candidates in this province is about 88,500, an increase of approximately 12,859 (+17%) compared to 75,641 in 2025, intensifying competition. Wuhan University is located in the central core city of Wuhan, which has strong cross-provincial appeal for liberal arts candidates in Shaanxi. 预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 225, a 10% enrollment reduction in 2026, a 17% increase in provincial history category candidates intensifying competition, and a somewhat negative reputation potentially suppressing some popularity, considering the competition intensification effect from the increased candidate pool, the predicted minimum ranking after minor adjustment is about 220, with a range of 190–250.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型计算及趋势修正，预测2026年武汉大学医学类在陕西省最低录取位次约为9718名，较2025年（8582名）继续小幅下降（位次数字增大），主要受扩招及新增低 分专业影响。预计录取区间在9426至10010名之间。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Wuhan University's medical programs in Shaanxi Province over the past five years have fluctuated significantly: 2021: 1232 (planned 10 students), 2022: 2063 (planned 10 students), 2023: 1476 (planned 8 students), 2024: 2233 (planned 7 students), 2025: 8582 (planned 11 students). The sharp decline in 2025 rankings was mainly due to the impact of Shaanxi's new college entrance examination reform (3+1+2 model), adjustments to the separate enrollment batch for medical programs, and the addition of the Public Health and Preventive Medicine major (minimum ranking 8582), which lowered the overall threshold. In 2026, the total planned enrollment for medical programs increased to 13 students (an increase of 2 students, approximately 18.2%), including the new Nursing major (3 students), which is expected to have a lower admission ranking and further reduce the minimum admission ranking for medical programs.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university under the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and has been selected into the Double First-Class construction university. The university has strong comprehensive strength, a complete medical discipline system, and possesses multiple advantageous majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology, enjoying a high reputation nationwide.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of medical majors continues to be high, with core majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology being highly competitive. Wuhan University is located in Wuhan, a central city in Central China, with obvious regional advantages. In 2026, the enrollment scale for medical programs in Shaanxi Province has expanded, with the addition of new majors like Nursing, providing more options for candidates at different score levels.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on comprehensive supply-demand elasticity model calculations and trend corrections, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Wuhan University's medical programs in Shaanxi Province in 2026 is approximately 9718, continuing a slight decline (increase in ranking number) from 2025 (8582), mainly due to enrollment expansion and the addition of low-score majors. The expected admission range is between 9426 and 10010.
